title: Brief
description: Validates a brief artifact — the external editorial commission that opens a Gazette issue. Consumed by the survey protocol.

issue_id.description: Identifier for this issue (e.g. 'weforge-history-001'). Establishes the issue identity echoed by every downstream artifact.

chronicle.description: What is being chronicled (e.g. 'the history of WeForge').

scope_intent.description: The period or thematic scope this issue should cover.

corpus_pointers.description: Where the historical record can be found — repositories, paths, URLs.

publication_target.description: Where the finished issue should be emitted.

context.description: Anything else the commissioner wants to include.
